programmes.show_description: Crime thriller with Robert De Niro. After a disastrous attempt to rob a casino belonging to a powerful crime boss, two criminals are forced to hijack a bus as they try to make a getaway. (2015)
Action-packed adventure on the high seas! A billionaire discovers that he must complete seven seemingly impossible tasks to prevent the apocalypse in this modern retelling of the classic myth. (2010)
Action adventure series based on Sir Arthur Conan Doyle's classic novel. An assassin linked to Marguerite's secret causes a rift with Roxton and threatens the explorers' lives. S3, Ep14/22
Innovative, value-for-money products brought directly to you at home. Shop 'til you drop whilst avoiding the hustle and bustle of the High Street.
Devastating sci-fi thriller starring Stephen Baldwin. When a top secret anti-matter weapon malfunctions it imbues a scientist with incredible abilities, including control of the weather. (2006)

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern high kicking martial arts western. Feuding gangs divide a neighbourhood at Christmas. S3, Ep11

Action-packed thriller with Bruce Willis. When his estranged son comes to visit him at a top-secret facility, a retired CIA agent realises an old enemy has followed him - and wants revenge. (2022)
Tense thriller with Sam Worthington. An escaped convict threatens to jump from a skyscraper, while his brother takes advantage of the ensuing chaos to carry out a plan of his own. (2012)

Thriller with Michael Douglas. While trying to expose a neo-Nazi who infiltrated the White House, a Secret Service agent is framed for murder and his protege is told to bring him to justice. (2006)
Crime thriller with Justin Timberlake. A student becomes the protege of a corrupt gambling tycoon in Costa Rica, only to come under pressure from the FBI to help bring his boss to justice. (2013)
